item.name: Orthos Craklaw Horn
item.description: When blown, this hardened horn emits a history-transcending sound that brings your Orthos craklaw scuttling to your side.

mount.name: Orthos Craklaw
mount.action: Summon forth your Orthos craklaw. May or may not have participated in famous battles which actually took place in history.
mount.description: Discovered in Eureka Orthos, this specimen of craklaw was imbued with magic in a bid to further harden its carapace. Though that experiment ended in failure, by way of a peculiar side effect, it has attained the power of flight.
mount.tooltip:
What you after? Fish? Crab?
- Eybor
